result.cover_letter:
18 July 2026

Hiring Team
Acme Corporation
Re: Program Manager

Dear Hiring Team at Acme Corporation,

My background as an Administrator is a direct match for the Program Manager role at Acme Corporation. In my most recent role, I owned sprint cadence, PI planning, capacity management, and executive status reporting for a multi-squad program, directly matching the Program Manager responsibilities at Acme Corporation.

You need a Program Manager to run sprint cadence and PI planning, manage capacity, produce executive status reporting, and drive test-automation strategy. I led end-to-end delivery for a squad within an eight-squad program, directly owning sprint cadence and PI Planning (PI 47–48). I managed capacity by converting a mathematically infeasible SIT window—75+ hours of manual evidence against 64 available hours—into an achievable plan through a six-day tiered harness build with a formal go/no-go gate, and I authored an executive change request that re-baselined test capacity from 30 to 90 person-days. For test-automation strategy, I architected a COBOL/mainframe test-evidence automation covering 200+ SIT/E2E scenarios across all eight squads, cutting evidence effort from ~3 hours to ~15 minutes per scenario. I also convened a cross-discipline technical war room that produced a binding automation recommendation in under three hours, reflecting the collaborative approach I bring to stakeholder alignment.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my experience delivering multi-squad programs with agile at scale can support Acme Corporation's goals. I am available for a call at your convenience and can provide further details on the outcomes achieved.

Sincerely,
Administrator
